blended.narrative: Whitewater is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,787 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
